name: BlueKCCommonRightFaxAPIJobIDRspnsUpdate

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT 1 AS DefaultRow) SELECT CAST(@{pipeline().parameters.COMM_SK} as int) AS COMM_SK, 'COMMTRNSMSN' AS COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'RGHTFAX' AS COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, CASE WHEN '@{pipeline().parameters.NoFileInd}' = 'Y' THEN 'FAILED' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobId}) <> '' THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAILED' END AS COMM_STTUS_CD, 'FAXRQST' AS COMM_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN '@{pipeline().parameters.NoFileInd}' = 'Y' THEN 'File Not Found' WHEN dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.JobId}) <> '' THEN 'Fax Request Initiated Successfully' ELSE 'Fax Request Initiated Unsuccessfull' END AS COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.JobId} AS COMM_JOB_ID, GETDATE() AS COMM_SENT_DTM, GETDATE() AS LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM cte
